title: The ability to sort form responses
excerpt: We are unable to sort the choices/options alphabetically and numerically.

posts.author: adrian.pescasio (Adrian Pescasio)
posts.cookedHtml: We are unable to sort the choices/options alphabetically and numerically.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Adrian,

To clarify, are you referring to sorting the form questions in the form itself? I.e. sorting the dropdown to display options in alphabetical order?

Thank in advance!
